creator: miguel.barao@gmail.com
text:
After the recent upgrade to terminus-font-4.48 the name has been changed from "Terminus" to "xos4 Terminus".
This change breaks configuration of several applications (e.g. urxvt, i3) which no longer can find the font, and there is no warning of the name change when doing the upgrade.

Please add this information to the install messages or remove the "xos4" from the name (if possible).
